name: Caffeine
description: A vasoconstrictor commonly used to reduce puffiness and dark circles.
scientificSummary: Constricts blood vessels beneath the skin and reduces fluid accumulation in tissues.
mechanismOfAction: Constricts blood vessels beneath the skin and reduces fluid accumulation in tissues.
